pages.text: $(bold)The Nanosuit Chestplate$() forms the core armor layer covering your vital organs. Fused directly into your body through nanobot integration, it provides superior protection against all forms of damage.$(br2)$(bold)Protection Level:$() Equivalent to Netherite
The central protective component of your nanosuit, safeguarding critical biological systems.

$(bold)Properties:$()$(br)- $(bold)Damage Resistance:$() Reduces incoming damage by significant margin$(br)- $(bold)Self-Repair:$() Nanobots continuously repair minor damage$(br)- $(bold)Impact Absorption:$() Converts kinetic energy into heat safely dispersed

$(bold)Durability:$()$(br)Unlike conventional armor, the chestplate does not degrade from normal damage. Its nanobot repair systems work continuously to maintain structural integrity.$(br2)Catastrophic damage from explosions or extreme sources can overwhelm these systems temporarily, requiring rest to recover.
